title: The House That Built Me
why_this_song: The House That Built Me by Miranda Lambert (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: This brokenness inside me might start healing
Out here, it's like I'm someone else
I thought that maybe I could find myself
If I could just come in, I swear I'll leave
Up those stairs in that little back bedroom
Is where I did my homework and I learned to play guitar
And I bet you didn't know under that live oak
My favourite dog is buried in the yard

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "thought" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "thought" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Up those stairs in that little back bedroom
From better homes and garden magazine
From the house that built me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: My favourite dog is buried in the yard
This brokenness inside me might start healing
And you do the best you can

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "The House That Built Me" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "The House That Built Me" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "The House That Built Me", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "The House That Built Me", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The House That Built Me" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The House That Built Me" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
